description_long: This object consists of a stack of three large, thick books, each with a distinctively colored cover: red on top, blue in the middle, and green on the bottom. The books are tightly bound together by a wide, tan leather strap that wraps vertically around the stack and is fastened with a metal buckle on the front. The pages of each book are visible from the sides, showing a uniform, light gray color with subtle horizontal lines indicating the paper edges. The covers are solid in color with no visible illustrations or text, giving the stack a clean and modern appearance. The strap features stitched details and metallic rivets, adding a touch of realism and functionality. The overall form is rectangular and compact, with the books aligned neatly and the strap holding them securely in place.
description: A stack of three thick, solid-colored books (red, blue, green) bound together by a tan leather strap with a metal buckle. The covers are plain and the pages are visible from the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three stacked books with the tan strap running vertically down the center, covers facing forward and no visible buckle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the rounded spines of the books and the strap wrapping over the top and bottom, with the colored covers and page edges clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the metal buckle and rivets on the strap, with the spines of the books facing outward and the colored covers stacked vertically.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rounded spines and the strap, similar to view 1 but from the other side, with the colored covers and page edges visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are rounded and match the color of each book (red, blue, green) with no visible text or decorative elements.
